feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Fiori
feed.subtitle: SAP Fiori Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP Odata Call from UI5
entry.content:
hi Experts,

I am new to UI5 and trying to a create app with a view with an input and a simple display only form.  The manifest is linked to backend odata SAP service.

Below is the Flow of the application :

AccountNumber( Input field) --> Get the AccountNumber from the Input and tag it to the filter to the SAP odata service and populated the response of the api in the form.

below is the example: 

<uri> / sap/opu/odata/SAP/BPACCBAL/BillAccDetailSet?$filter=(AccountNumber eq '1234567890')

FYI: This specific filter works in the postman so the service is up and running.

Below is the xml view with the form:

<form:SimpleForm
                        id="sf2"
                        maxContainerCols="2"
                        editable="false"
                        layout="ResponsiveGridLayout"
                        labelSpanL="3"
                        labelSpanM="3"
                        emptySpanL="4"
                        emptySpanM="4"
                        columnsL="1"
                        columnsM="1">
                        <form:content>
                            <Label text="{i18n>ObjectSupplierName}"/>
                            <Text text="{AccountNumber}"/>
                            <Label text="{i18n>ObjectSupplierName}"/>
                            <Text text="{BillingName}"/>
                            <Label text="{i18n>ObjectSupplierAddress}"/>
                            <Text text="{Address1}  {Address2} {City} {Zipcode} "/>
                        </form:content>
</form:SimpleForm>
 
Manifest:
    "dataSources": {
      "bpService": {
        "uri": "sap/opu/odata/SAP/BPACCBAL/",
        "type": "OData",
        "settings": {
          "annotations": [],
          "localUri": "localService/metadata.xml",
          "odataVersion": "2.0"
        }
      }

 

is there a way to apply the filter and bind  to the form directly ?

Thanks

entry.title: How to display 3d pdf images in sap fiori and add a location marker inside that image?
entry.content:
I am working on a requirement where we need to display 3D Pdf images and also should be capable to add location markers inside it.
Could anyone guide or provide inputs on how we can achieve this in fiori?

entry.title: How to add 1 more option to the field Purpose of visit
entry.content:
Hi Team ,

I have Extension App from standard app "FIN_TR_CRE" which contains  Purpose of Visits.

How to add one more option to Purpose of Visit in oData Service . Please help me out to solve this.

Thanks & Regards,

Sravani G.

entry.title: How to Highlighting Line Items Based on Criticality in Fiori Elements using WebIDE
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I'm Trying to add Color to Line items based on Criticality, But I'm not able to get the expected output,

Kindly Advice based on the Below codes and Snip of the Application.

entry.title: CICD - Configure an SAP Fiori for the onpremise ABAP Platform
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am new and trying to build the pipeline using CICD services for Freestyle Fiori projects. i have to deploy the app to the on premise ABAP platform using CICD. Currently the infrastructure works fine for manual deployment.

Currently i have created the job in CICD and able to complete the prerequisite steps like job creation, credentials mapping, web hook. init and build stage is successful.  i need your help for setting up release stage

Configure the stages of your SAP Fiori for the ABAP platform job directly in the SAP Continuous Integration and Delivery service.

In the release stage - Upload Credentials - is the gateway server credentials to be given?

 Configure the stages of your SAP Fiori for the ABAP platform job in your repository.

  1. In the Git repository in which your project sources reside, create a new file named .pipeline/config.yml.
  2. Copy the following content into your config.yml file:
     

these steps do anyone has the sample file with all the configuration steps written 

 

Regards,

Ragavie

entry.title: odata services are not loaded when the app is ran locally from BAS
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

 Odata metadata are not loaded while running app locally on BAS also in BTP launchpad (cloud foundry). which was working fine previously. Is it because of any version updates or do I need to update version? 

The same set of Odata Service metadata are loaded in onPremise system as expected.

entry.title: SAP UI V9.0について
entry.content:
お世話になっております。

1) S/4HANAのコンポーネントでSAP UI V7.0というものがありこれが何を示しているのかわかりません。

2) 現在のバージョンの確認の仕方、サポート期限、最新バージョンの確認の仕方についても教えていただきたいです。

3) SAP UI2についても同様に教えていただきたいです。

以上、よろしくお願いいたします。


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Data load error in overview page cards upon using guided development
entry.content:
I am facing an error upon using fiori guided development. 

In VSCode, upon using guided development, if the new card fails to show data due to incorrect data binding or error 50014 then there is a constant error which prevents loading of data in other cards. 

At the current moment I am using git reset --hard to remove all modifications after the previous commit to load data normally. I want to know the cause of this because the code looks same, as there will be modifications in manifest.json and annotation.xml only.

Code used for cards are provided for reference.

entry.title: SAP CAP Attachment Handling
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am working on attachments handling in CAP. i can able to upload and download the files from UI in view.xml using UploadSet control.

My scenario is changed now. I have to attach a file from my webapp folder for uploading in controller level without using view.xml

I tried setting the url of the file location like below

this.byId("uploadset").setUploadUrl("path of the fille from webapp folder")

this.byId("uploadset").setUrl("path of the fille from webapp folder")

after writing the above code, i am triggering AfterItemAdded method where i could not see "item" in the mParamerter inside the oEvent.

I tried using 

this.byId("uploadset").additem

this.byId("uploadset").uploadItem

but no luck.

How to attach a file for upload in controller level.

Please help.

 

Thanks,

Gowtham

entry.title: Fiori Performance issue with /sap/bc/apc/sap/webgui called several times per second
entry.content:
Good Afternoon,

We have been using a productive S4 system with Fiori since a few months.

The web reverse proxy in front of the S4 backend is quite loaded.

Looking at the logs it turned out that there are average ~200 https requests per seconds for a server with 50 SAP users.

Looking at the urls, it turned out that 95% of the requests are for the following url:
/sap/bc/apc/sap/webgui_services?window_id=x&session_id=x&pr_session_id=x HTTP/1.1
A Fiori client IP address keeps accessing it several times per seconds.

Could you tell me when is this url called by Fiori?

Intuitively it looks like the client keeps refreshing this page several times per second.
Are there any settings that could be use reduce this refresh rate?

Have a nice day.

entry.title: Authentication error occurs in Fiori application
entry.content:
I'm developing an app that uses OData service as a data source with Fiori application, but I'm having trouble with the authentication part.

I have entered the email address in "Service username" and the S user password in "Service password", but the authentication is not successful.

The OData service URL displays view data in SAP Datasphere, and we have confirmed that view data can be displayed from the URL.

If anyone has any idea why authentication is not possible, please contact us.

SAP Fiori tools OData

entry.title: Anyone tell me , How to Export UI5 Screen as pdf file upon button click
entry.content: How to save UI5 Screen as Pdf File with multiple pages.

entry.title: Visual Studio failing while adding the deployment configuration of the SAPUI5 application
entry.content: Visual Studio Code is throwing an error while I am trying to add the deployment configuration of the SAPUI5 application. The error message is "TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'www-authenticate') To continue with project generation choose a different deployment target or skip adding deploy config." Any guidance on fixing this issue is highly appreciated.

entry.title: SAP CAPM Hybrid Testing - 404 not found error while calling Backend OData services
entry.content:
Hello All,

We are trying to set up local debugging for the existing CAPM full stack application which was already deployed on BTP Cloud Foundry. We have generated .CDSRC.PRIVATE.JSON file using CDS BIND command for all the services including destination service. We have upgraded CDS package from 5*  to 

 "@sap/cds": "^7.2.1" as CDS BIND command doesn't work in the lower version.  We are using 2 OData-v2 services in UI as below
 
1) CAPM Service - OData V2 -Server.js - get Call ends with 404 Not found
const proxy = require('@sap/cds-odata-v2-adapter-proxy');
const cds = require('@sap/cds');
module.exports = cds.server;

cds.on('bootstrap', (app) => {
    app.use(proxy({
        isoDate: true
    }))
});
2) CPI Service - OData V2. - get Call ends with 404 Not found
 
http://localhost:56738/gw/odata/SAP/GETDATA;v=1/$metadata?sap-language=EN 
 
Below is the screenshot of services in Manifest..json file
 

 

 
This application is running successfully on BTP currently. UI is loading successfully but not able to connect to back end services in Manifest while we set up for Hybrid testing. Would any one please point me the issue ? Thanks.

entry.title: SAP CAPM Hybrid Testing - 404 not found error while calling Backend OData services
entry.content:
Hello All,

We are trying to set up local debugging for the existing CAPM full stack application which was already deployed on BTP Cloud Foundry. We have generated .CDSRC.PRIVATE.JSON file using CDS BIND command for all the services including destination service. We have upgraded CDS package from 5*  to 

 "@sap/cds": "^7.2.1" as CDS BIND command doesn't work in the lower version.  We are using 2 OData-v2 services in UI as below
 
1) CAPM Service - OData V2 -Server.js - get Call ends with 404 Not found
const proxy = require('@sap/cds-odata-v2-adapter-proxy');
const cds = require('@sap/cds');
module.exports = cds.server;

cds.on('bootstrap', (app) => {
    app.use(proxy({
        isoDate: true
    }))
});
2) CPI Service - OData V2. - get Call ends with 404 Not found
 
http://localhost:56738/gw/odata/SAP/GETDATA;v=1/$metadata?sap-language=EN 
 
Below is the screenshot of services in Manifest..json file
 

 

 

 
This application is running successfully on BTP currently. UI is loading successfully but not able to connect to back end services in Manifest while we set up for Hybrid testing. Would any one please point me the issue ? Thanks.

entry.title: SAP ITSM auto assign message processor
entry.content:
Currently Incidents are assigning to support team directly using partner determination procedure (brfplus rules).
But could you help to know, can we directly assign to any specific message processor ?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Create Menu Button/Action within a Section
entry.content:
Hello Gurus,

I have a RAP-based Fiori app (OData V2).
I want to create a menu button on my app's Object Page within the "myObjectFacet" section.
To do this I used the approach described in the standard documentation (here).
So, I expect to see three buttons (Action1, Action2, Action3) inside one (Actions), but I see them as separate button.
The "menu" property doesn't seem to have any effect at all.
I would be grateful for any useful hint, link or advice from your side.

Thank You!

My implementation (manifest.json)

 

"sap.ui.controllerExtensions": {
	"sap.suite.ui.generic.template.ObjectPage.view.Details": {
		"controllerName": "...ObjPageExt",
		"sap.ui.generic.app": {
			"ZC_MyObjPg": {
				"EntitySet": "ZC_MyObjPg",
				"Sections": {
					"myObjectsFacet": {
						"id": "myObjectsFacet",
						"Actions": {
							"ActionOne": {
								"id": "ActionOne",
								"text": "{@i18n>actOne}",
								"press": "onExecAction",
								"visible": true,
								"enabled": true
							},
							"ActionTwo": {
								"id": "ActionTwo",
								"text": "{@i18n>actTwo}",
								"press": "onExecAction",
								"visible": true,
								"enabled": true
							},
							"ActionThree": {
								"id": "ActionThree",
								"text": "{@i18n>actThree}",
								"press": "onExecAction",
								"visible": true,
								"enabled": true
							},
							"MenuActions": {
								"text": "{@i18n>act}",
								"visible": true,
								"menu": [
									"ActionOne",
									"ActionTwo",
									"ActionThree"
								]
							}
						}
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
}

 

Result

entry.title: UI Integration Card Deployment to Fiori Launchpad
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I'm exploring the UI Integration cards. I'm able to deploy the UI Integration card on SAP Workzone.

But can I deploy the same UI Integration card on Fiori Launchpad? If it is possible then how can I do so?

 

Thanks,

Nikesh

entry.title: How to make API Calls in Typescript UI5 application Using BTP destination services
entry.content:
Hi team,

I want to consume an API using Typescript in SAP Fiori app. I have created the destination for the API but while calling the API using Typescript code below:

 

const myHeaders = new Headers();
        myHeaders.append("X-RapidAPI-Key", "7a015aab54msha50600648f3b570p1527d0jsn6359aad8f1b8");
        myHeaders.append("X-RapidAPI-Host", "pricer.p.rapidapi.com");

        const requestOptions = {
            method: "GET",
            headers: myHeaders,
            redirect: "follow" as RequestRedirect
        };

    const response=await fetch("/destinationname"+"/iphone"+"/str?q=iphone", requestOptions)
    const jsondata=await response.json() 
    console.log(jsondata)
    return jsondata 

 

But it's not working,

 

Please help me for fixing this issue.

entry.title: Showing "NOT Found" error for deployed TypeScript UI5 application in cloud foundry
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am new to Typescript Ui5 development  I have build and deploy my project in Cloud Foundry , but it is showing not found error to me , i wasn't getting any error while deploying the project nor for local testing the project. But when deployed it is giving ne "NOT FOUND" error.

Please help me to recognize this error and fix it
